name: Round Laboratory-Grown Diamond Band
description: Half-eternity band with round laboratory-grown diamonds set in 18K white gold. Dazzle confirms laboratory-grown diamond origin, certificate path, metal purity, and lead time before advance payment.

details.growthMethod: CVD or HPHT confirmed during consultation
details.certificateNumber: Shared when the selected stone is reserved

metalHallmark: BIS hallmarking guidance for gold jewellery
dimensions: Final measurements, ring size, chain length, or bracelet length confirmed during consultation.
careInstructions: Store separately, avoid harsh chemicals, and request professional cleaning guidance based on the final metal and setting.
uniqueFeatures: Consultation-first design with explicit origin disclosure and verification before order confirmation.
